entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: Drier areas of southern Africa where farmers experience frequent drought

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: Country where the Conservation Agriculture Task Force operated and PCA was promoted

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where relief investment lessons from Zimbabwe are applicable

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Periodic lack of rainfall occurring every two to three years in southern Africa

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming strategy designed for vulnerable households with limited draft power

entities.name: PRECISION CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach involving high management standards, minimum tillage, and precision fertilizer application

entities.name: MINIMUM TILLAGE
entities.description: A PCA principle involving reduced soil disturbance to concentrate water and nutrients

entities.name: PLANTING BASINS
entities.description: A specific minimum tillage technique used to concentrate limited water and nutrient resources

entities.name: PRECISION APPLICATION OF NITROGEN-BASED FERTILIZER
entities.description: The application of small doses of fertilizer to achieve higher nutrient efficiency

entities.name: CEREAL
entities.description: Grains whose yields were increased by 50 to 200% through the PCA approach

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, increased by PCA and input-use efficiency

entities.name: INCOMES
entities.description: Financial returns for farmers, increased by the implementation of PCA

entities.name: NUTRIENT EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which plants use nutrients, improved by precision fertilizer application

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of achieving sustainable productivity gains in drought-prone farming systems

entities.name: INPUT-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficient application of water, fertilizer, and seed to provide sustainable productivity gains

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The long-term foundation laid by the Task Force in a poor, drought-prone country
